name: Gallant Micro. Machining Co., LTD.
summary: Gallant Micro. Machining Co., LTD. designs, manufactures, and sells front-end and back-end packaging and inspection equipment for manufacturing semiconductors in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and China. Its principal products include semiconductor process equipment, semiconductor detecting equipment, laser application equipment, precision machineries, and precision molds. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Gallant Micro. Machining Co., LTD. operates as a subsidiary of Gallant Precision Machining Co., Ltd.
